people.name: Stan O. Abada
people.title: Managing Director
people.summary: Multidisciplinary program and engineering leader with 13+ years of experience across project/program management, systems architecture, software & hardware development, and test/quality engineering. Delivered initiatives from $50K to $60M+ by aligning stakeholders, controlling risk, and driving execution discipline.
strengths: End-to-end delivery: scope, schedule, budget, risk
Quality engineering discipline and operational readiness

people.name: Kelvin O. Esemomoh
people.title: Operations Director
people.summary: Multidisciplinary Medical equipment specialist. Stakeholders alignment, controlling risk, and driving execution discipline.Kelvin oversees all commercial, risk, subcontractor management and serves as a strategic advisor to executive leadership. Kelvin holds a Bachelor's degree in Business Administration from Fresno Pacific University, California and has worked in the medical field for over 10 years as a Lead Certified Surgical Instrument Coordinator, medical sales and respiratory therapy in the United States.He has 19+ years experience in Business Planning, Business Intelligence, Management & Development.
